notes: Interior wall blocks — solid partitions used to divide ship/station interiors into rooms. 9 entries: 4 flat-ish shapes (Flat, Flat Half, Corner, Corner with Side) and 4 pillar variants (Pillar Flat, Pillar Slope, Pillar Curved Thick, Pillar Curved Thin), all 2.5 m, plus one planned stub (Interior Wall Pillar — family overview page with no infobox yet). All built from Steel Plate only; health == mass. `wallShape` captures the geometry variant.

resources.description: Used for partitioning areas on grids and creating rooms.
